description: Doctoral research at the intersection of AI and cybersecurity. Exploring machine learning and deep learning approaches to detect and prevent phishing attacks, contributing to safer digital environments.
highlights: Researching ML and deep learning methods for phishing detection and prevention
Developing cybersecurity strategies using modern AI techniques
Contributing to academic work on intelligent, multi-layer threat detection
